programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Declarada culpable y demente, Gabriela es internada en un centro psiquiátrico. Ella tiene alucinaciones, producto de una droga que le inyectaron. Antonia consigue la custodia de David.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Gabriela es salvajemente golpeada en su celda y pierde al bebé. A Alejandro le hacen creer que ella misma, en su locura, se provocó el aborto. Antonia la visita triunfante y ella jura vengarse.

programme.title: Al otro lado del muro
programme.desc: Mientras Ernesto esta bajo los efectos del narcótico, Sofía le roba los datos del negocio de la trata, guardados en el dispositivo que lleva colgado en el cuello. Alondra y Sofía se reconocen.

programme.title: Al otro lado del muro
programme.sub-title: Atacan a Alejandra y a su hija
programme.desc: Rumbo a la iglesia, mientras Ernesto espera a su prometida, atacan a Alejandra y a Alondra, llevándose a la joven por la fuerza, por órdenes de Paula. Humillan al Cónsul sin contemplaciones.

programme.title: Al otro lado del muro
programme.desc: Alondra y otras jovencitas están secuestradas en la mansión Extravaganza, donde Joel y Sofía llegan para rescatarlas antes de que sean vendidas como esclavas sexuales. Jennifer huye del manicomio.

programme.title: Dueños del paraíso
programme.desc: Elías cuestiona a Anastasia al encontrar una maleta y ella culpa a su madre. Quezada se encierra y pierde el conocimiento. Elizondo confunde a Verónica cuando le dice lo que siente por ella.

programme.title: Dueños del paraíso
programme.desc: Conrado y Anastasia hacen el amor, pero Renato le reclama a ella. Sergio le dice a Adán que van a ser socios porque le va a financiar sus próximos tres largometrajes y Érica será la protagonista.

programme.title: Señora Acero: El Teca encuentra a Salvador
programme.desc: Salvador entra al túnel, pero lo que no sabe es que el Teca sigue sus pasos y podría ser usado como carnada para dar con su madre. Dóriga le confiesa su amor a Sara. La Tuti consuela a otro hombre.

programme.title: Pasión prohibida
programme.desc: Guillermo llega al departamento de Eliana a cobrarle el favor que le hizo, la seduce. Bruno invita a una amiga a su casa a pasar la noche, Bianca los sorprende semidesnudos y enfurece.

programme.title: Pasión prohibida
programme.desc: Una demanda de 20 millones de dólares le espera a los Piamonte, ya saben que Guillermo está detrás. Flavia ilusiona a Nina nuevamente y le hace creer que Bruno está enamorado de ella.

programme.title: Pasión prohibida
programme.desc: Flavia tiene un nuevo plan, le cuenta a Ariel lo que está pasando entre Nina y Bruno. Guillermo le deja dinero a Eliana para sus gastos, Bruno lo ve salir del edificio donde vive su exnovia.

programme.title: Eva la Trailera
programme.desc: Pablo y Bobby encuentran a Adriana. Ella se recupera en el hospital y pide ver a su madre lo antes posible. Marlene trata de convencer a Armando de que interne a Fabiola, pero él se niega.

programme.title: Eva la Trailera
programme.desc: Adriana le cuenta a su madre todos los abusos que sufrió y le confirma los verdaderos planes de Marlene y Andrés. Pablo deduce que los Palacios usaron a la hija de Eva. Bobby regresa solo.

programme.title: Eva la Trailera
programme.desc: Después del reencuentro con su madre, Adriana llega fortalecida y enfrenta a Marlene en su propia casa. También encara a Armando y le pide que frene a Andy para que no se acerque a ella.

programme.title: Eva la Trailera
programme.desc: Arrepentido, Armando le pide volver a Eva, quiere que sean la misma pareja de antes. Pablo pide al juez anular el juicio contra ella, la visita como su abogado y le promete que la sacará.

programme.title: Corazón valiente
programme.desc: Samantha confirma que Lorena y su hija están muertas. Clara llega a buscarla. Juan Marcos está siendo vigilado y corre peligro. Miguel y Fabiola no pueden controlar sus celos.

programme.title: Corazón valiente
programme.sub-title: Clara es el vientre en alquiler
programme.desc: Esteban descubre que Clara está esperando un bebé de Samantha y Willy. Confirman que Lorena nunca estuvo embarazada. Fabiola besa a Miguel. Todos acompañan a Willy antes de su operación.

programme.title: Teresa

programme.title: María, la del barrio

programme.title: María Mercedes
programme.desc: Malvina no puede aceptar que su hijo se preocupe tanto por María Mercedes. El padre de María Mercedes muere lo que la pone muy triste, pero Jorge Luis la consuela.

programme.title: María Mercedes
programme.desc: El papá de María Mercedes es enterrado, ella está muy deprimida y alguien en su casa quiere atormentarla dejándole una cruz de tierra en su cama.

programme.title: Marimar

programme.title: Marimar
programme.desc: Inocencia recibe una carta de Marimar, lo que la hace pensar que regresó por Sergio. Marimar le asegura a Angélica que hará lo que sea para enviarla a prisión por los crímenes que cometió.

programme.title: María, la del barrio

programme.desc: Después de ver a Luis Fernando con Soraya, María decide irse de la casa y regresar a su barrio. María se arrepiente de enamorarse de Luis Fernando, pues sufre por su amor no correspondido.

programme.title: Triunfo del amor

programme.title: Triunfo del amor
programme.desc: Max se entera de que Victoria tiene cáncer. Ximena irrumpe en casa de María y, enloquecida, le dice que su hijo ha muerto. Bernarda no está dispuesta a devolver a su hijo a María. Victoria le pide a Max que no le cuente a nadie lo de su cáncer.

programme.title: Lo que la vida me robó
programme.desc: Josefina le pide a Tomás devolverle el poder sobre su dinero, pero él se niega porque sabe que le dará todo lo que tiene a Dimitrio.

programme.title: Lo que la vida me robó
programme.desc: Fabiola esconde el dinero de un peligroso narcotraficante y pone en riesgo la libertad de Alejandro. Montserrat le cuenta a Alejandro que Pedro y José Luis quieren hacerle daño.

programme.title: Lo que la vida me robó

programme.title: Lo que la vida me robó

programme.title: Sortilegio: Hijo legítimo

programme.title: Vecinos

programme.title: Una familia de diez
programme.desc: La familia prepara una despedida de soltera para Martina antes de la boda. Los hombres se ven obligados a asar al futuro marido, que llega con su sexy hija.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Alma está desesperada por la desaparición de Roberta en el colegio nadie sabe nada. José y Lupita le mienten a Alma al decirle que no saben a dónde fue Roberta. Javier ayuda a Roberta a escaparse, pero al final se arrepiente.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Roberta golpea a Sol por burlarse de ella. Alma y Martín buscan a Roberta para hablar con ella sobre su custodia. Roberta decide irse a vivir con su padre. Lola busca entre las cosas de Lupita y encuentra los papeles donde dice que ella es adoptada.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Roberta le ofrece a Lupita hablar con Lola para que ya no se sienta triste, pero Lola no acepta que Lupita no le haya dicho la verdad sobre su origen desde un principio. Pilar pelea con Sol por sus burlas. Lupita se reconcilia con Lola.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Roberta pasa su primera noche en la casa de su papá. Gastón corre a Jose de la escuela y la maestra Hilda la recibe en su casa.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Sol le confiesa a Raquel que conquistará a Gastón para que olvide a Mia. Miguel y Mia se encuentran afuera del salón y le dicen a Roberta que no habrá protesta porque los descubrieron. El profesor Enrique regresa al Colegio y se encuentra con Julia.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Roberta platica con José y le dice que Gastón la odia, ella cree que fue una carga muy grande y por eso está enojado. Alma dona toda la ropa de Roberta a una casa hogar.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Gastón es buscado por la policía y cree que José fue quien los llamó. Mia le pone una trampa a Sol para que deje de usar su perfume. Teo y Miguel van con la policía a casa de Gastón. Miguel quiere impedir que Gastón se vaya.

programme.title: Cañaveral de pasiones

programme.title: Cuando me enamoro

programme.title: Cuando me enamoro
programme.desc: Renata le muestra las pruebas de su inocencia a Jerónimo, sin embargo, él sigue firme en su postura. Fina provoca a Constanza y la llama casquivana. Renata se va con Agustín.

programme.title: Cuando me enamoro

programme.title: Cuando me enamoro
programme.desc: Pese a sentirse mal, Fina se niega a llevar a Roberta con un médico o al hospital. Chema habla con Selene sobre sus sospechas de las fotos que mandaron a Honorio. Una tormenta azota los lugares aledaños a "La Bonita".

programme.title: Cañaveral de pasiones
programme.desc: Remedios le cuenta a Fausto que Dinorah era la amante de Amador y que Margarita trató de evitar que se fugaran juntos. Fausto le reclama a Dinorah por engañarlo y ella le dispara.

programme.title: Cañaveral de pasiones
programme.desc: Dinorah huye de su casa después de matar a Fausto para que no la culpen por su muerte. Julia encuentra a Fausto muerto en su oficina y cree que se suicidó. Remedios se siente culpable porque cree que Fausto murió por lo que ella le contó.

programme.title: Santo y Blue Demon vs. Los Monstruos

programme.title: El Chanfle II
programme.desc: El más extraño de los fanáticos del balompié, se ve envuelto en muchos enredos a causa de su honestidad.

programme.desc: Una joven siente que su mamá no la quiere y solo se preocupa por la salud de su hermana gemela. Cuando un chico se fija en su hermana, la joven comienza a molestarla provocando que sufra un ataque, como consecuencia, la joven cambiará totalmente.

programme.sub-title: Tito el Bambino y Adrián Uribe

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.sub-title: Pierre Ángelo, Albertano y el Compayito

programme.title: Aquí y ahora

programme.title: Aquí y ahora

programme.title: Aquí y ahora

programme.title: Modern Pioneering with Georgia Pellegrini
programme.desc: Georgia visits two women who are reclaiming the land that their ancestors once worked, while serving their community through food, farming and ranching. Georgia learns about the ways they are trying to impact and teach others to connect with the land and access healthy food. They roll up their sleeves together in the soil and in the kitchen, making recipes passed down through generations. (S2 E04)

programme.title: Modern Pioneering with Georgia Pellegrini
programme.desc: Georgia brings the audience into the kitchen with her to share delicious garden to table recipes. Along the way she pays a visit to an artisan beeswax candle maker who teaches her the art of candle making. Georgia then goes to sit at the pottery wheel with a gifted ceramicist to create candle holders and elements for a table setting. (S2 E05)

programme.title: Modern Pioneering with Georgia Pellegrini
programme.desc: In preparation for a dinner party, Georgia searches for wild edibles in unlikely places, and pays a visit to a pair of women glass blowers who create works of usable art in their glass studio in Brooklyn, New York. They work together to make glass pieces for the dinner table. Georgia brings us back to the kitchen to cook delicious dishes and set a table with their glassware. (S2 E06)

programme.title: Modern Pioneering with Georgia Pellegrini
programme.desc: Georgia visits a distinctive florist in Austin, Texas whose sculptural approach to flower arranging is unlike any other. He teaches her his approach and technique and ways the audience can create pieces that start a conversation and tell a story in their own homes. Georgia then stops off at a tea house to learn about the ancient and resurgent art of drinking tea from an expert. Georgia takes us back to the kitchen to make a delicious meal and integrate what she's learned. (S2 E07)

programme.title: Modern Pioneering with Georgia Pellegrini
programme.desc: Georgia visits master copper artisans to learn about the art of hand hammered copper, and all of the ways it can be used in the kitchen and home. We then visit an artisan chocolate maker and learn recipes for making truffles at home. Georgia takes us back to the kitchen to create some delicious cocktails and recipes using all that she has learned. (S2 E08)

programme.title: Patis Mexican Table
programme.desc: In Tucson, Pati learns the basics of artisan bread-making from one of America's best bakers, Don Guerra of Barrio Bakery. This experience sets her on a mission to cross into Sonora, Mexico, to see where the Sonoran wheat Don uses for his breads originates. Pati takes what she learned back to her kitchen to create a menu of tasty recipes using wheat flour. (S9 E01)

programme.title: Patis Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati spends a day in Sonora's capital, Hermosillo, visiting some of the city's best culinary destinations. From gigantic burritos at Doña Guille, to a meat lover's feast with the owner of the popular restaurant Mochomos, mingling with the young crowd at La Ruina brew park, and a treat no trip would be complete without, Sonoran hot dogs, Pati experiences all Hermosillo's food scene has to offer. (S9 E02)

programme.title: Patis Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati experiences two important Sonoran culinary traditions. First, on the coast in Bahía Kino, local fishermen receive “the blessing” from a woman from the Seri tribe before heading out on the water to catch giant sea scallops. Then, in the mountain town of Matape, Nere, one of Sonora's few female butchers, shares with Pati a tradition called “the benefit” and how she helps feed the community. (S9 E03)

programme.title: Patis Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati learns that carne asada goes way beyond grilled meat in Sonora. It's an important weekly ritual that brings the whole family together. Back home, Pati throws a carne asada in her backyard for her husband and boys. First, she teaches them the basics of a true Sonoran carne asada. Then, for dessert, a whipped peanut buttercream and grape galette. (S9 E04)

programme.title: Pati's Mexican table
programme.desc: Sonoran wheat has shaped the cuisine of the entire Mexican north and is a staple of Sonoran cuisine. Pati tours one of Hermosillo's oldest flour mills and gets a lesson on making coyotas, a traditional dessert, at a local bakery. In her kitchen, Pati shares her take on a classic Sonoran recipe – a carne con chile burrito. Then, she shows us how to make coyotas at home. (S1 E05)

programme.title: Pati's Mexican table
programme.desc: Pati spends a day in the kitchen with her middle son, Sami, cooking recipes inspired by her travels in Sonora that she knows he'll love – beef and potato chimichangas, rice with lentils and caramelized onions, and an avocado and radish salad. In Sonora, Pati sees how the family bond can be the secret to delicious recipes at a famous family run street food stand, Johnny's Tacos in Hermosillo. (S1 E06)

programme.title: Pati's Mexican table
programme.desc: Pati travels to Sonora's coast on the Sea of Cortez, where local legend Toño Contreras gives her a tour including shellfish on the beach, his restaurant Mariscos El Rey, and his home kitchen for some crave-worthy recipes. This inspires Pati to make a couple seafood-loaded recipes at home – double-stacked shrimp and cheese tacos and a Sonoran-style shrimp and scallop tostada. (S1 E07)

programme.title: Up Up and Away
programme.desc: First, it's up, up, and away, for Lou, Froy, and Matt. All of their skills are tested when they attempt to take down not one, but two hot air balloons. Then, Lou and Froy find themselves in the wrong part of town, repo'ing a sports car from a former gang member who's not afraid to go back to jail. Finally, Lou and Lyndah break in Frankie, the new guy, with a repo that turns into a confrontation with three spray-paint-packing graffiti girls.

programme.title: Family Drama
programme.desc: First, Lou, Froy, and Matt team up with Eva, an alluring lending agent, who sets up a sting to repo a limousine from its delinquent owner.

programme.title: Kegger and Refrigerator
programme.desc: First, Lyndah has some tension with Frankie when they repo a truck from a moving company in the middle of relocating some fragile material for a very important client. Then, Froy, Sonia, and Frankie crash a raging kegger in a bad part of town and have to contend with a gaggle of irate partiers in order to secure their target vehicle. Finally, Lou and Matt find themselves in one of the worst situations imaginable when they realize that the car they're trying to repo has been fitted with what seems to be an explosive device.

programme.title: Going Green and Falling Down
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy arrive on the scene to a repo a car that's been refitted to run on biodiesel and are shocked to see that its owner shares some of Sonia's features.

programme.title: Look What You Did!
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy get locked in the battle of a lifetime with a pair of young debtors who are understandably upset that their late model Tahoe has found its way to the bottom of a lake. Is it Froy's fault, as they claim, or are there other forces at work here? Then, Lou and Matt get down and dirty with a taser-packing P.I. who isn't ready to say goodbye to his ride. Finally, when Frankie puts the go-jacks on the wrong car, it plucks Matt's last nerve and places him at risk for the beat-down of the century.

programme.title: That's Disrespectful
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Lyndah are faced with a choice. Do they attempt to reclaim a burnt-out husk of a car from its high-flying owners, or do they just give up and go home?

programme.title: Smoke, Lead, and Alcohol
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy venture into one of the city's most dangerous neighborhoods, only to find a debtor ready to defend his ride by pumping it full of lead, with no concern for who gets caught in the crossfire.

programme.title: Missed Dates
programme.desc: First, Lyndah is put in a tough situation - she has to control a sobbing, cop-calling debtor and turn away Frankie's unwanted and inappropriate advances - all at the same time. Then, Matt and Froy have two problems on their hands, when they decide to haul away both a stripped-down husk of a car and the phone number of its owner's coquettish and bathrobe-wearing ex-girlfriend. Finally, Lou, Froy, and Lyndah head way out into the country to wrangle with a case of mistaken identity and a trio of shotgun-wielding cultists.

programme.title: Broken Tooth Lou and Bad Breath Frankie
programme.desc: First, Froy and Lyndah probably need to schedule a trip to the dentist after Lou's tooth gets knocked out in the course of a tense confrontation with two irate debtors. Then, Frankie seriously blows a routine voluntary repo when the owner smells something on his breath. With Lou racing to the scene, is this the end of the road for the new guy? Then, Lou's problems get even worse when a rampaging construction crew employs an excavator to demolish the target Camry - with Froy inside of it.

programme.title: Matt Vs. Giant Chicken
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy cope with the uncertainty of Lou's condition by liberating a Vespa from a leather-clad biker and his rabble-rousing girlfriend. Then, Matt and Froy head out again to claim a Toyota Yaris from a truant children's entertainer wearing an unexpected outfit. And finally, the whole team heads out to repo more than six cars from an insolvent dealership, with the fate of their leader still in question.

programme.title: Segway This Way
programme.desc: First, Matt and Sonia hit the beach to repossess an old-fashioned classic surfer car from an old-fashioned surfer looking for a classic tussle. Then, Froy and Matt stretch their wits to identify and take down an uncooperative Segway renter. Hopefully, one of them knows how to ride that thing. And finally, Lou, Lyndah, and Froy crash a house-party to claim a Civic from an out-of-control wannabe gangster.

programme.title: The Canals of Deceit
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy get messy when they head to Venice Beach to track down and recover a canoe from the world-famous canals. Then, Lyndah and Sonia confront a distraught widow with a terrible secret. And finally, there's no time-out for Lou and Matt when a posse of soccer players get physical to protect their precious and unpaid-for Camaro

programme.title: Captain Lou
programme.desc: First, Lyndah and Matt interrupt a debtor's bicycle ride to repossess his Jeep, but when Matt's buttons get pushed, some bikes might get broken. Then, Froy and Sonia negotiate with a sensible debtor who's more trouble than she seems... or is she? And finally, Lou, Sonia, and Froy hit the open water to repo a luxury yacht - but first they'll have to wrangle with a surly sea captain, not to mention the Coast Guard.

programme.title: Native Operation
programme.desc: First, Matt and Lou confront an ungentlemanly drunk at an upscale gentleman's club in an effort to repossess his late model BMW. Then, Sonia and Matt head over to the wrong side of the tracks to reclaim a motorcycle from a different kind of biker. And finally, Matt and Froy cross the border into a nearby reservation to wrangle with a belligerent debtor and two unimpressed representatives of the tribal police.

programme.title: Should Have Seen This Coming
programme.desc: First, Lou, Sonia, and Froy unfurl an elaborate sting when they repo a taxicab by tricking its driver into picking them up. But what to do with his ferociously inebriated client?

programme.title: Yellowstone
programme.desc: Oscar and Emmy winner Kevin Costner is the marquee attraction of the ensemble cast in this drama series, starring as the patriarch of a powerful, complicated family of ranchers. A sixth-generation homesteader and devoted father, John Dutton controls the largest contiguous ranch in the United States. He operates in a corrupt world where politicians are compromised by influential oil and lumber corporations and land grabs make developers billions. Amid shifting alliances, unsolved murders, open wounds, and hard-earned respect, Dutton's property is in constant conflict with those it borders -- an expanding town, an Indian reservation, and America's first national park.

programme.title: Wild Pyrenees
programme.sub-title: The Pirate Of The Mountains: The Bearded Vulture
programme.desc: Who are those brave, ready to face valiantly these snowstorms, this freezing humidity which never leaves you when it seizes you? They are golden eagles. Their wingspan exceeds two meters. Even from this distance, you can feel the power of the animal. Behind this royal dance hides the hunting instinct of a super predator. However, on the ground, prey is scarce at the end of winter. My eye is drawn to an aerial gathering. I can't count them all. They are vultures, the first raptors to be served on the remains.

Watts 4) Looking for a job? Highlight your ability, not your experience | Jason Shen 5) How to be an upstander instead of a bystander | Angélique Parisot-Potter

programme.title: Angry Planet | Hawaii
programme.desc: We have filmed extensively in Hawaii, filming big-wave surfing at the famous Banzai Pipeline on Oahu's North Shore, and filming George surfing with the “Hawaian Fire” firefighters. We have also filmed at the Hawaii Tsunami Institute and in Hilo, site of major Tsunami damage in both 1946 and 1964. We also have filmed extensively at Kilawea Volcano, filming the amazing sight of rivers and waterfalls of red hot lava flowing into the Pacific Ocean.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Italia Wild
programme.desc: Italy is one of the very few nations in the world that regularly gets three major extreme natural phenomena – volcanos, flooding, and avalanches. Eastern flanks of the volcano to slip by up to two metres, and many houses on the flanks of the volcano experienced structural damage. The eruption also completely destroyed the Rifugio Sapienza, on the southern flank of the volcano. The Rifugio was the site of a cable car station which had previously been destroyed in the 1983 eruption both have now been rebuilt. The most recent eruption was in November 2006.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Kenya
programme.desc: Definitely our wildest episode so far. Here's the deal: Mt. Elgon is an 14,000 foot volcano in eastern Kenya. We propose a safari/ascent of the dormant volcano. Here's the first kicker: High on the the flanks of the volcano is Kitum Cave – a cave created by the most unique form of erosion – Elephant Erosion. For millennia elephants have been going into the cave to carve it out with their tusks in order to eat the salty rock. Here's the second kicker: the cave is thought to be the home of the Ebola Marberg virus – the world's most deadly virus. So here's the plan: We are going enter the cave, at night, wearing full Bio-Hazard suits to protect us from the virus.

programme.title: Angry Planet | By Camel to Timbuktu
programme.desc: It is time for “Angry Planet” to do a serious desert episode. What better place to do it than this fabled city in the middle of the mighty Sahara Desert.This almost mythical place really does exist. And it really is still possible to travel there by camel caravan, riding the infamous “Ships of the Desert”. Extreme heat, dehydration, possible sand storms, frigid night temperatures and desert predators are our potential companions for the trip.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Indian Monsoon
programme.desc: In June of next year we plan to intercept the Monsoon as it hits southern India and makes its way north along the western shore past Goa and Mumbai up to Delhi.This most famous of torrential rainy seasons drops as much as 40 feet of water on parts of the parched sub-continent.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Hot and Cold Crystals
programme.desc: Miners in Chihauhau, Mexico, has just discovered an amazing sight. Deep in the earth, only 300 feet from a pocket of molten magma, is an amazing chamber filled with giant blue and pink crystals – some as big as 60 feet long! It is an extraordinary find – and one that is very difficult to witness, as temperatures run to 150 F, with 100% humidity. The Mexican authorities are only opening up the cavern to scientists and film crews – “Angry Planet” plans to be one of the first in!

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.sub-title: A Little Bit Country, A Little Bit Rock N Roll
programme.desc: The large teams dissolve, and the designers are now asked to work in pairs. The teams must make two looks—one red carpet and one performance—for country music star Miranda Lambert.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: The designers must work in teams of two to create looks for “mature” women, who also serve as their clients and models for this challenge. Joan and Melissa Rivers guest judge.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: Before the challenge begins, the designers are asked to re-pick their teams. Then, in teams of two, the designers are tasked with making a prom dress out of duct tape. In addition to the Runway, they are also judged on their work by a group of high school students, whose votes factor into their final score. Two designers are eliminated.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: Regrouping once again, the judges decide which designers they would like to see work together, and the teams are separated into two teams of four. The designers must make cohesive looks for the male dance troupe Thunder From Down Under. Not only must they execute menswear, but their designs must be able to “tear away” onstage as part of their performance.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: In new teams of twos and threes, the designers make a ready-to-wear look for Lord and Taylor, inspired by their famous rose design. The winning design is manufactured and sold at Lord and Taylor for Spring 2013.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: In pairs again, the designers use HP technology and inspiration drawn from the Guggenheim Museum to create two looks: one avant-garde and a second ready-to-wear piece. They are also able to design their fabric for this challenge.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: After working in teams all season, the designers are relieved when they receive the news that they will now be working on their own. However, some of the eliminated designers return to act as assistants and help the competitors complete their look. For this challenge, the designers must make a Spring 2013 editorial look to be worn by actress Jordana Brewster and featured in Marie Claire.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: The remaining designers are paired with new assistants and each sent to a European fashion capital: Paris, Barcelona, London, and Berlin. One unlucky designer stays in NYC. The designers must draw inspiration from their city, as well as purchase their materials there. Upon returning to NYC, they must create a look for the judges that will prove they have what it takes to design a collection for Fashion Week.
